name: App Store: App Details
description: Open one App Store app page and extract title, subtitle, category, description, version info, ratings summary, screenshot sources, and review rows. Accepts either a numeric `app_id` or a full `app_url`. Use `mode` to choose how deep to go on reviews. Read-only.

browser_automation.description: Navigates to the app page, scrolls to load lazy sections, extracts the metadata/screenshots/reviews visible on the product page, and (in full mode) opens the full Ratings & Reviews page for more review rows.

sequences.name: appstore_app_details
sequences.description: Resolve app URL from app_id or app_url, extract metadata, screenshots, reviews; optional deep review mode.

optional_variables.name: app_id
optional_variables.description: Numeric App Store app id (e.g. 1232780281). Either this or `app_url` must be set.

optional_variables.name: app_url
optional_variables.description: Full App Store app URL. Overrides `app_id` if both are given.

optional_variables.name: country
optional_variables.description: Two-letter storefront code. Defaults to 'us' when only `app_id` is given.

optional_variables.name: mode
optional_variables.description: One of: with-reviews | full. with-reviews (default) = metadata + screenshots + on-page reviews. full = also opens /see-all=reviews for a deeper review batch. (basic is accepted as an alias for with-reviews.)

steps.name: Open the App Store in a fresh tab
Resolve target URL from app_id / app_url / country and redirect
Scroll the page to force lazy review content to mount
steps.script: (async () => { const sleep = (ms) => new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms)); for (let i=0;i<4;i++) { window.scrollBy(0, 1500); await sleep(700); } window.scrollTo(0,0); return { scrolled: 4 }; })()

steps.name: Extract reviews visible on product page
[mode=full] Open the full Ratings & Reviews page
[mode=full] Wait for full review page hydration

help.summary: Open one App Store app page; return metadata, screenshots, and reviews.

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: Numeric App Store app id. Either this or app_url must be given.

parameters.name: app_url
parameters.description: Full App Store URL. Overrides app_id when both are set.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Two-letter storefront code. Used only when constructing the URL from app_id. Defaults to 'us'.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: with-reviews (default) = metadata + screenshots + on-page reviews; full = also opens /see-all=reviews for a deeper review batch. 'basic' is accepted as an alias of with-reviews.

examples.description: Notion — US, with the on-page reviews (default mode).
Default with-reviews mode: metadata + screenshots + on-page reviews.

help.returns: Object with app metadata (title/subtitle/category/description/version/ratings), screenshot array (src/srcset/alt), and review array (title/author/date/body/rating_aria). In full mode the full-page review array is additionally included.
notes: Either app_id or app_url must be supplied; if both are set, app_url wins.
The product page is React/Svelte-rendered; we rely on IDs (`#productRatings`, `#allProductReviews`, `#product_media_phone_`) which have been stable across Apple's redesigns.
`rating_aria` carries the '4.5 out of 5 stars' accessibility label — that's the most reliable numeric rating read.
`mode=full` incurs an extra page navigation and ~4s wait.
